laws.actName: National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli (Civil Service) Amendment Rules, 2015
laws.title: Amendment of Schedule I, Part C
laws.description: Amends Schedule I, Part C relating to posts in Entry Grade and Selection Grade, inserting Sl. Nos. 16 and 17 (Information Officer and Tourist Information Officer), and updating the number of posts from 18 to 22.
laws.simpleExplanation: Adds Information Officer and Tourist Information Officer positions for the Andaman and Nicobar Administration and updates the number of posts from 18 to 22.

laws.actName: National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli (Civil Service) Amendment Rules, 2015
laws.title: Amendment of Schedule I, Part A
laws.description: Amends Schedule I, Part-A relating to Grades and Sanctioned Strength of the Service, updating the sanctioned strength numbers.
laws.simpleExplanation: Updates the sanctioned strength of the service by changing entries such as 24 to 28 and 472 to 476.

laws.actName: National Capital Territory of Delhi, Andaman and Nicobar Islands, Lakshadweep, Daman and Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli (Civil Service) Amendment Rules, 2015
laws.title: Amendment of Total Posts in Schedule I
laws.description: Amends the Total column in Schedule I, updating various post numbers.
laws.simpleExplanation: Modifies the total number of posts in the service across different categories.
